claim: Dream Worlds animates a pretrained Gaussian Splatting scene by updating only Gaussian centers with simple force rules.
processing_notes: Manually composed vector SVG from the notebook and report method specification; all glyphs are conceptual and no experimental output is reconstructed. The PNG is a direct raster export of the SVG at 1440 x 640 pixels.
selection_note: No qualitative examples selected; this is a conceptual method diagram.
